title: GBC: Gradient-Based Connections for Optimizing Multi-Agent Systems
innovation_summary: GBC: Gradient-Based Connections for Optimizing Multi-Agent Systems: We propose Gradient-Based Connections (GBC), an approach for fine-grained attribution and optimization of multi-agent systems.
